user_query: I want to fetch the current weather data and air quality index for a hiking trip location, as well as a 5-day forecast and severe weather alerts.

TaskList.description: Fetch the current weather data for the location with latitude 39.3 and longitude -120.2.
Fetch the air quality index for the location with latitude 39.3 and longitude -120.2.
Fetch the 5-day weather forecast for the location with latitude 39.3 and longitude -120.2.
Fetch any severe weather alerts for the location with latitude 39.3 and longitude -120.2.
